title: pectis stenophylla var. gentryi
intro: Pectis stenophylla var. gentryi, also known as Gentry's false buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pectis stenophylla var. gentryi include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
